buses.name: TranscriptBus
buses.purpose: Implements the Fiat-Shamir transcript as a bus: TranscriptAir replays every observe/sample event and all other AIRs receive the values they consume.

message_format.description: Transcript index (contiguous from 0 within a proof)

producers.note: sole sender; replays the full transcript log

buses.invariants: Multiset equality: every (tidx, value, is_sample) sent by TranscriptAir is received exactly once across all consumer AIRs within each proof.

buses.name: GkrModuleBus
buses.purpose: Handoff from the ProofShape module to the GKR module carrying the GKR/LogUp hypercube parameters.

message_format.description: Maximum hypercube dimension across all AIRs

buses.invariants: Exactly one message per proof; multiset equality between sender and receiver.

buses.name: BatchConstraintModuleBus
buses.purpose: Handoff from the GKR module to the BatchConstraint module carrying the GKR input-layer numerator and denominator claims.
buses.invariants: Exactly one message per proof; gkr_input_layer_claim[0] is numerator, [1] is denominator.

buses.name: StackingModuleBus
buses.purpose: Handoff from the BatchConstraint sumcheck to the Stacking module; signals sumcheck completion and carries the transcript index.

message_format.description: Transcript index after the batch constraint sumcheck

buses.invariants: Exactly one message per proof.

buses.name: WhirModuleBus
buses.purpose: Handoff from the Stacking module to the WHIR module carrying the batched opening claim after mu-folding.

message_format.description: Transcript index after mu-batching randomness is sampled

buses.invariants: Exactly one message per proof.

buses.name: WhirMuBus
buses.purpose: Passes the mu batching challenge from the Stacking module to the WHIR module for combining stacking claims.
buses.invariants: Exactly one message per proof.

buses.name: MerkleVerifyBus
buses.purpose: Carries Merkle authentication path nodes: MerkleVerifyAir receives child hashes and sends parent hashes at every level.

message_format.description: Merkle index used for bit-source shifting
merkle_idx_bit_src right-shifted past the leaf tree depth
Full depth of the Merkle tree including the leaf-hashing part
Boolean: 1 for leaf-combining rows, 0 for authentication path

producers.note: sends parent hashes at each level
sends leaf hashes of initial opened rows
sends leaf hashes for codeword rows

consumers.note: receives child hashes at each parent step

buses.invariants: Multiset equality across all Merkle authentication path messages; single-row constraints only; root hash verified against CommitmentsBus.

buses.name: Poseidon2PermuteBus
buses.purpose: Global lookup table of Poseidon2 permutation evaluations (input, permute(input)).

consumers.note: leaf hashing of initial opened rows

buses.invariants: Every looked-up pair satisfies output = Poseidon2_permute(input); table size equals total permutation calls across all proofs.

buses.name: Poseidon2CompressBus
buses.purpose: Global lookup table of Poseidon2 compression evaluations, used for Merkle tree hashing.
buses.invariants: Every looked-up pair satisfies output = Poseidon2_permute(input)[0..8].

buses.name: AirShapeBus
buses.purpose: Lookup table of per-AIR shape properties (AirId, NumInteractions, NeedRot) for each AIR present in the child proof.
buses.invariants: sort_idx values are contiguous within a proof; property_idx in {0,1,2}.

buses.name: HyperdimBus
buses.purpose: Lookup table of per-AIR hypercube dimensions, encoded as |n| with a sign bit to support negative dimensions.
buses.invariants: n_sign_bit is boolean; n_abs = |log_height - l_skip|.

buses.name: LiftedHeightsBus
buses.purpose: Lookup table of lifted trace heights per column partition, where lifted_height = max(trace_height, 2^l_skip).
buses.invariants: lifted_height = 2^log_lifted_height; log_lifted_height = max(log_height, l_skip).

buses.name: CommitmentsBus
buses.purpose: Lookup table of Merkle root commitments for both stacking commitments and each WHIR round commitment.

message_format.description: Major commitment index: 0 for stacking, round+1 for WHIR
Minor index: stacking matrix index or 0 for WHIR

consumers.note: verifies authentication paths lead to correct root

buses.invariants: commitment is a valid Poseidon2 digest; (major_idx, minor_idx) uniquely identifies a commitment.

buses.name: PublicValuesBus
buses.purpose: Carries the child proof's public values from PublicValuesAir to the constraint evaluator.

message_format.description: Child AIR index the public value belongs to
Index within the AIR's public values vector

consumers.note: uses public values during constraint evaluation

buses.invariants: Multiset equality; in continuations mode a message may be sent more than once so long as receives match.

buses.name: StackingIndicesBus
buses.purpose: Lookup table mapping stacked columns to their (commit_idx, col_idx).
buses.invariants: Each (commit_idx, col_idx) pair appears exactly once per proof in the table.

buses.name: ColumnClaimsBus
buses.purpose: Carries per-column opening claims from the stacking module to the symbolic expression evaluator.

message_format.description: Claimed column evaluation at the opening point
Boolean: 1 if a rotated column evaluation

buses.invariants: Multiset equality; is_rot is boolean; claim is an extension field element.

buses.name: XiRandomnessBus
buses.purpose: Distributes xi extension-field challenges used in the GKR protocol.
buses.invariants: Each idx appears exactly once as a send; xi is sampled from the transcript.

buses.name: ConstraintSumcheckRandomnessBus
buses.purpose: Carries the batch constraint sumcheck round challenges r_0..r_{n_max}.
buses.invariants: idx ranges 0..n_max; each round challenge is sampled from the transcript.

buses.name: WhirOpeningPointBus
buses.purpose: Carries opening points from the stacking sumcheck and eq_base AIRs to the WHIR MLE evaluation tree.
buses.invariants: Each idx appears exactly once as a send and once as a receive.

buses.name: WhirOpeningPointLookupBus
buses.purpose: Internal lookup version of opening points, used within the MLE evaluation tree layers of FinalPolyMleEvalAir.

message_format.description: Opening point value (stacking/WHIR sumcheck challenge at that round)

producers.note: add_key_with_lookups at first node of each layer

consumers.note: lookup_key at remaining nodes of each layer

buses.invariants: Each idx in 0..num_total_sumcheck_rounds appears exactly once.

buses.name: EqNegBaseRandBus
buses.purpose: Passes the base randomness (u_0, r_0^2) from stacking's EqBaseAir to the batch constraint EqNegAir.
buses.invariants: Exactly one message per proof.

buses.name: ExpBitsLenBus
buses.purpose: Global lookup table for partial exponentiation: result = base^(bit_src & ((1 << num_bits) - 1)).

message_format.description: Number of low bits of bit_src to use

buses.invariants: result = base^(bit_src & ((1 << num_bits) - 1)); num_bits is a small positive integer.

buses.name: RightShiftBus
buses.purpose: Global lookup table for right-shifting: result = input >> shift_bits. Secondary table provided by ExpBitsLenAir.
buses.invariants: result = floor(input / 2^shift_bits).

buses.name: RangeCheckerBus
buses.purpose: Global 8-bit range-check lookup table: verifies value fits within max_bits (always 8).
buses.invariants: Every entry satisfies 0 <= value <= 255; max_bits = 8.

buses.name: PowerCheckerBus
buses.purpose: Global lookup table of powers of two: exp = 2^log.
buses.invariants: exp = 2^log for every entry; log in 0..POW_CHECKER_HEIGHT.

buses.name: SelUniBus
buses.purpose: Lookup table of univariate selector polynomial evaluations, used at sumcheck points in the batch constraint module.
buses.invariants: is_first is boolean; value is an extension field element.

buses.name: SelHypercubeBus
buses.purpose: Lookup table of hypercube selector polynomial evaluations over the prefix of sumcheck randomness.
buses.invariants: is_first is boolean; value = product(r_i) or product(1 - r_i) depending on is_first.

buses.name: EqNegResultBus
buses.purpose: Carries negative-dimension equality polynomial results (eq_n and rotation kernel k_rot_n) for AIRs with log_height < l_skip.
buses.invariants: One message per distinct negative hypercube dimension; multiset equality.

buses.name: ExpressionClaimNMaxBus
buses.purpose: Passes the maximum hypercube dimension n_max from proof shape to expression claim computation.

message_format.description: Maximum hypercube dimension across all AIRs

buses.invariants: Exactly one message per proof.

buses.name: FractionFolderInputBus
buses.purpose: Passes the count of present AIRs from proof shape to the fractions folder.

message_format.description: Number of AIRs present in the proof

buses.invariants: Exactly one message per proof.

buses.name: NLiftBus
buses.purpose: Passes the lift amount n_lift = max(0, l_skip - log_height) per AIR, used for zero-padding short traces.
buses.invariants: One message per AIR in the proof.

buses.name: AirPresenceBus
buses.purpose: Lookup table of per-AIR presence flags, used by SymbolicExpressionAir to decide which AIRs to evaluate.

message_format.description: Boolean: 1 if the AIR is present in the proof

buses.invariants: is_present is boolean; one entry per possible AIR index.

buses.name: Eq3bShapeBus
buses.purpose: Passes shape parameters (n_lift, n_logup, num_interactions) per present AIR to Eq3bAir.

message_format.description: Number of interactions for the AIR

buses.invariants: One entry per present AIR.

buses.name: EqNsNLogupMaxBus
buses.purpose: Passes the global LogUp dimension n_logup and the maximum hypercube dimension n_max to EqNsAir.
buses.invariants: Single entry per proof.

buses.name: ConstraintsFoldingInputBus
buses.purpose: Passes the transcript index of the lambda challenge to ConstraintsFoldingAir.

message_format.description: Transcript index where lambda was sampled

buses.invariants: Exactly one message per proof.

buses.name: InteractionsFoldingInputBus
buses.purpose: Passes the transcript index of the beta challenge to InteractionsFoldingAir.

message_format.description: Transcript index where beta was sampled

buses.invariants: Exactly one message per proof.

buses.name: FinalTranscriptStateBus
buses.purpose: Carries the final Poseidon2 sponge state from the transcript to the continuations circuit (continuations only).
buses.invariants: Exactly one message per proof on the last transcript row; active only when continuations enabled.

buses.name: PreHashBus
buses.purpose: Carries the child VK pre-hash for incorporation into the inner verifier's public values (continuations only).
buses.invariants: Exactly one message per proof; active only when continuations enabled.

buses.name: ProofShapePermutationBus
buses.purpose: Internal sequencing bus within ProofShapeAir enforcing ordering of shape entries by sequential index.
buses.invariants: Exactly one message per proof; send/receive balance ensures exactly one summary row per proof.

buses.name: StartingTidxBus
buses.purpose: Internal ProofShapeAir bus passing starting transcript indices between phases of proof shape computation.

message_format.description: Starting transcript index for that AIR

buses.invariants: One message per AIR; multiset equality within ProofShapeAir.

buses.name: NumPublicValuesBus
buses.purpose: Carries the number of public values per AIR along with the transcript index at which PV observation begins.

message_format.description: Transcript index at which PV observation begins
Number of public values for the AIR

buses.invariants: One message per AIR.

buses.name: GkrXiSamplerBus
buses.purpose: Coordinates xi challenge sampling between GKR layer processing and the xi sampler AIR.
buses.invariants: One message per xi challenge; multiset equality.

buses.name: GkrLayerInputBus
buses.purpose: Carries the initial GKR layer-0 claim from GkrInputAir to GkrLayerAir.
buses.invariants: Exactly one message per proof.

buses.name: GkrLayerOutputBus
buses.purpose: Returns the final GKR input-layer claims (numerator/denominator) from GkrLayerAir back to GkrInputAir.

message_format.description: Total number of GKR layers processed

buses.invariants: Exactly one message per proof.

buses.name: GkrSumcheckInputBus
buses.purpose: Sends the combined claim for a GKR layer to GkrLayerSumcheckAir for sumcheck verification.

message_format.description: Boolean: 1 if this is the final GKR layer

buses.invariants: One message per GKR layer; is_last_layer is boolean.

buses.name: GkrSumcheckOutputBus
buses.purpose: Returns the sumcheck result (reduced claim and eq(r, r')) from GkrLayerSumcheckAir back to GkrLayerAir.

message_format.description: eq(r, r') at sumcheck output point

buses.invariants: One message per GKR layer.

buses.name: GkrSumcheckChallengeBus
buses.purpose: Passes challenges between consecutive sumcheck sub-rounds within the same GKR layer (GkrLayerSumcheckAir internal).

producers.note: from one round to the next

consumers.note: at the start of the next round

buses.invariants: One message per sumcheck round per GKR layer; multiset equality.

buses.name: BatchConstraintConductorBus
buses.purpose: Central distribution lookup in the batch constraint module for sumcheck challenges (R), GKR xi challenges, and mu batching.
buses.invariants: msg_type in {0,1,2}; table entries published by providers are queried by batch constraint sub-AIRs.

buses.name: SumcheckClaimBus
buses.purpose: Chains sumcheck claims between rounds in the batch constraint sumcheck (univariate and multilinear).
buses.invariants: One message per sumcheck round.

buses.name: SymbolicExpressionBus
buses.purpose: Lookup table of symbolic expression DAG node evaluations, enabling sharing of intermediate node values.
buses.invariants: node_idx identifies a node in the DAG; each lookup finds a provided entry.

buses.name: ExpressionClaimBus
buses.purpose: Carries evaluated constraint and interaction expression claims to ExpressionClaimAir.

message_format.description: Boolean: 1 if interaction expression, 0 if constraint

buses.invariants: is_interaction is boolean; one message per constraint/interaction per AIR.

buses.name: InteractionsFoldingBus
buses.purpose: Carries folded interaction field values (message elements and multiplicities) from SymbolicExpressionAir to InteractionsFoldingAir.

message_format.description: Boolean: 1 if multiplicity, 0 if message field
Index within the interaction's message vector

buses.invariants: is_mult is boolean; one message per field element per interaction per AIR.

buses.name: ConstraintsFoldingBus
buses.purpose: Carries folded constraint values from SymbolicExpressionAir to ConstraintsFoldingAir.
buses.invariants: One message per constraint per AIR.

buses.name: Eq3bBus
buses.purpose: Carries the partial 'eq_3b' equality polynomial evaluation for each interaction, used in the GKR-to-constraint-sumcheck reduction.
buses.invariants: One message per interaction per AIR; eq_3b is an extension field value.

buses.name: EqSharpUniBus
buses.purpose: Carries partial products of the 'sharp univariate' equality polynomial, accumulated via butterfly expansion.
buses.invariants: One message per (xi_idx, iter_idx) pair.

buses.name: EqZeroNBus
buses.purpose: Carries the base-case (n=0) equality polynomial value for the regular and sharp variants.

message_format.description: Boolean: 1 for sharp variant, 0 for regular

buses.invariants: is_sharp is boolean; one message per variant.

buses.name: EqNOuterBus
buses.purpose: Lookup table of equality polynomial values eq_n(xi, r) indexed by dimension n and variant.

message_format.description: Boolean: 1 for sharp variant, 0 for regular

buses.invariants: is_sharp is boolean; table has one entry per (is_sharp, n).

buses.name: EqNegInternalBus
buses.purpose: Internal recursive bus within EqNegAir carrying intermediate values between recursive steps of eq_n for n < 0.
buses.invariants: One message per recursive step.

buses.name: UnivariateSumcheckInputBus
buses.purpose: Passes the transcript index to UnivariateSumcheckAir, signaling where the univariate sumcheck round begins.

message_format.description: Transcript index at univariate sumcheck start

buses.invariants: Exactly one message per proof.

buses.name: StackingModuleTidxBus
buses.purpose: Internal transcript-index handoff within the Stacking module between its sub-AIRs.

message_format.description: Transcript index at the sub-module boundary

buses.invariants: One message per sub-module transition; multiset equality across stacking sub-AIRs.

buses.name: ClaimCoefficientsBus
buses.purpose: Carries per-column batching coefficients for combining column claims within each stacking commitment.
buses.invariants: One message per stacked column.

buses.name: SumcheckClaimsBus
buses.purpose: Carries sumcheck claims between stacking sub-modules (stacking-internal).
buses.invariants: Exactly one message per proof per module_idx boundary.

buses.name: EqRandValuesLookupBus
buses.purpose: Lookup table of the random values u_i used in the stacking equality polynomial eq(u, .).
buses.invariants: One entry per index i.

buses.name: EqBaseBus
buses.purpose: Carries the base-case equality polynomial evaluations (eq, eq_shifted, product form) from EqBaseAir.
buses.invariants: Exactly one message per proof.

buses.name: EqBitsInternalBus
buses.purpose: Internal recursive bus within EqBitsAir passing partial eq evaluations between levels of a binary computation tree.

message_format.description: Most significant num_bits bits of the row index (excluding LSB)
LSB of the receiving row's b_value

buses.invariants: One message per internal tree node; multiset equality.

buses.name: EqKernelLookupBus
buses.purpose: Lookup table of equality kernel values (eq_in, k_rot_in) indexed by dimension n.

message_format.description: Input eq value at dimension n
Input rotation kernel at dimension n

buses.invariants: One entry per dimension n.

buses.name: EqBitsLookupBus
buses.purpose: Lookup table of partial equality polynomial evaluations indexed by bit pattern, for stacking sumcheck AIRs.

message_format.description: Most significant num_bits bits of the row index

buses.invariants: One entry per (b_value, num_bits) combination.

buses.name: WhirSumcheckBus
buses.purpose: Carries pre/post sumcheck claims for each WHIR round between WhirRoundAir and SumcheckAir (WHIR).

message_format.description: WHIR round index owning this sumcheck

buses.invariants: One message per WHIR sumcheck round.

buses.name: WhirAlphaBus
buses.purpose: Lookup table of WHIR alpha folding challenges, one per round.
buses.invariants: One entry per WHIR round.

buses.name: WhirEqAlphaUBus
buses.purpose: Carries the product eq(alpha, u) from WHIR sumcheck logic to the final polynomial evaluation.
buses.invariants: Exactly one message per proof.

buses.name: VerifyQueriesBus
buses.purpose: Coordinates the query verification phase of each WHIR round, carrying gamma, omega, and pre/post claims.

message_format.description: Number of queries to verify in this round
Domain generator for this WHIR round

buses.invariants: One message per WHIR round that has queries.

buses.name: VerifyQueryBus
buses.purpose: Carries individual per-query verification data (Merkle path opening and claimed evaluation).

message_format.description: Merkle index bit source for this query

buses.invariants: One message per query per WHIR round.

buses.name: WhirQueryBus
buses.purpose: Carries accumulated query evaluation results from WHIR query verification to the final polynomial evaluator.
buses.invariants: One message per query per WHIR round.

buses.name: WhirGammaBus
buses.purpose: Carries gamma challenges (one per WHIR round) used to batch multiple query results.
buses.invariants: One message per WHIR round.

buses.name: WhirFoldingBus
buses.purpose: Carries intermediate FRI-like folding state during WHIR: coset geometry, twiddle factors, and accumulated polynomial values.

message_format.description: Coset size at this folding level
Twiddle factor for this folding step

producers.note: sends parent values in the folding tree

consumers.note: receives child values at each parent node

buses.invariants: One message per folding step per query per WHIR round.

buses.name: FinalPolyMleEvalBus
buses.purpose: Carries the MLE evaluation of the WHIR final polynomial at the opening point.

message_format.description: MLE evaluation of the final polynomial

buses.invariants: Exactly one message per proof.

buses.name: FinalPolyFoldingBus
buses.purpose: Internal bus carrying values between layers of the final polynomial's binary MLE evaluation tree in FinalPolyMleEvalAir.

message_format.description: Explicit per-proof index in the message struct (in addition to the bus-level prefix)
Transcript index at which final-poly coefficients start
Partial MLE product at this node

buses.invariants: One message per node in the MLE evaluation tree.

buses.name: FinalPolyQueryEvalBus
buses.purpose: Carries the final polynomial's direct evaluation at query points in the last WHIR round.

message_format.description: Index of the final WHIR round
Polynomial evaluation at the queried point

buses.invariants: One message per query in the final WHIR round.

buses.name: WhirFinalPolyBus
buses.purpose: Lookup table of the WHIR final polynomial's coefficients after all folding rounds.
buses.invariants: One entry per coefficient index.

buses.name: CachedCommitBus
buses.purpose: Carries cached trace commitments from ProofShapeAir to enclosing continuations-circuit verifier AIRs for verification against the VK (continuations only).

message_format.description: Cached partition index within the AIR
Poseidon2 digest of the cached trace

producers.note: sends when the AIR has cached traces

buses.invariants: Active only when continuations_enabled = true; cached_commit is a Poseidon2 digest; one message per cached partition per present AIR with cached traces.
